creator: dym@afalina.od.ua
text:
Basically I added the menu item “X11” to the setup menu, checking and setting this menu item according to the setting in make.conf and separately checking this item to set FLAVOR to "x11" or "nox11".
This reverts to classic behavior and leaves FLAVOR.

P.S. Although I don't understand the need for FLAVOR when using the classic option. The only difference from classic is the addition of a suffix to the assembled package.
Breaking behavior for the sake of niceties, IMHO, is not the right way to go.
